name: Post daily motivational quotes to Telegram using Gemini

parameters.text:
Generate one short, original motivational quote (under 25 words) and a fitting author name (can be a real famous person or a fitting fictional/anonymous attribution like "Unknown"). 

Respond ONLY in this exact format, nothing else:
QUOTE: <the quote text>
AUTHOR: <the author name>

parameters.content:
## 🌅 Post daily motivational quote images to Telegram using Gemini and HTML to Image

### Who's it for
Community managers, content creators, and anyone running a Telegram channel who wants to automatically post a fresh motivational quote image every day — no manual design work required.

### How it works
On a daily schedule, this workflow asks Google Gemini to generate a short, original motivational quote with an author attribution. The quote is parsed into clean fields, rendered into a styled image using the HTML to Image API, and posted directly to your Telegram channel as a photo.

### How to set up
1. Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and add it as an admin to your Telegram channel with permission to post.
2. Connect your Telegram bot token as a credential in n8n.
3. Connect your Gemini API credential for quote generation.
4. Sign up at htmlcsstoimg.com for a free API key, and add it as a Header Auth credential (Name: CLIENT-API-KEY, Value: your key).
5. Set your channel's @username in the final Telegram node.
6. Activate the workflow.

### Requirements
- A Telegram bot token and a Telegram channel (with the bot added as admin)
- A Gemini API key (free tier available)
- A free htmlcsstoimg.com API key

### How to customize
- Edit the HTML/CSS template to change colors, fonts, or layout
- Adjust the Schedule Trigger to post at a different time or frequency
- Change the quote generation prompt to target a specific theme (e.g. business, fitness, mindfulness)
- Swap the image style for a branded template with your logo
